H6495: Hapishanenin açılışı Paqach'tan iki katına çıktı; (bir zindanın açılması), yani hapishanenin teslimi (mecazi olarak, günahın kurtuluşu) -- hapishanenin açılışı.
H6496: Paqad'dan belirlenen görev, vali, makam, gözetmen; bir başkomiser (sivil, askeri veya dini) -- bu görevi üstlenen, vali, makam, gözetmen belirlenmişti.
H6497: yarım küre, kullanılmayan bir kök anlamından patlamaya; yalnızca yarı küre şeklindeki paqqu'ah'a benzer bir süslemenin mimari terimi olarak kullanılır.
H6498: kabak Peqa' ile aynısından; yabani salatalık (tohumlarını dökmek için yarılarak açılmasından elde edilen) - kabak.
H6499: genç öküz, buzağı, öküz Veya par {pençe}; parar'dan; bir öküz (görünüşe göre vahşi bir güçle öne çıkıyor veya belki de toynağı bölüyor) - (+ genç) boğa (-ock), buzağı, öküz.
H6500: verimli ol İlkel bir kök; meyve vermek - verimli olmak.
H6501: yaban eşeği Veya pereh (Yeremya 2:24) {peh'-reh}; çılgına dönmenin ikincil anlamındaki para'dan; yaban eşeği - yabani (eşek).
H6502: Piram Pere'den; çılgınca; Piram, Kenanlı -- Piram.
H6503: Parbar, banliyö Veya Parvar {par-vawr'}; yabancı kökenli; Parbar veya Parvar, Kudüs'ün dörtte biri - Parbar, banliyö.
H6504: dağıtmak, bölmek, birleşim yerinden çıkmak, parçalanmak, dışarıya dağılmak, benliği ayırmak, kendini koparmak, esnemek, ilkel bir kök; kırmak, yani (kendini) yaymak veya ayırmak - dağıtmak, bölmek, eklemin dışına çıkmak, parçalamak, dağılmak (yurt dışına), ayrılmak (kendini), kendini kesmek, esnemek, kopmak.
H6505: katır Paraddan; bir katır (belki de yalnızlık alışkanlıklarından dolayı) - katır.
H6506: katır Kadınsı pered; dişi katır — katır.
H6507: tohum Parad'ın dişi pasif katılımcısı; ayrılmış bir şey, yani bir çekirdek - tohum.
H6508: orman, meyve bahçesi Yabancı kökenli; bir park – orman, meyve bahçesi.
H6509: doğurmak, meyve vermek, olmak, doğurmak, verimli kılmak, büyütmek, çoğaltmak İlkel bir kök; meyve vermek (gerçek veya mecazi olarak) - doğurmak, (meyve vermek), (olmak, meydana getirmek, yapmak) verimli, büyümek, çoğalmak.
H6510: inek, düve, kine Dişi eşit; bir düve — inek, düve, inek.
H6511: Parah Parah ile aynı; Parah, Filistin'de bir yer -- Parah.
H6512: köstebek Puwr'dan; bir delik (kırılmış olarak, yani Kazılmış) -- + köstebek. Chaphor'u karşılaştırın.
H6513: Phurah P'orah için; yeşillik; Purah, bir İsrailli -- Phura.
H6514: Perida, Peruda Veya Priyda {per-ee-daw'}; parad'dan; dağılım; Peruda veya Perida, "Süleyman'ın hizmetkarlarından" biri - Perida, Peruda.
H6515: Paruah Parach'ın pasif katılımcısı; çiçek açtı; Paruah, bir İsrailli -- Paruah.
H6516: Parvaim Yabancı kökenli; Parvajim, bir Doğu bölgesi -- Parvaim.
H6517: pan, pot Parar'ın yayılma anlamındaki pasif katılımcısı (parach'ı karşılaştırın); bir tava (düz veya derin) - tava, tencere.
H6518: köy Ayırmak anlamındaki kullanılmayan bir kökten yani Karar Ver; bir reis - köy.
H6519: Sursuz kasaba, sursuz köy, sursuz köy Aynı parazdan; açık bir ülke - (duvarsız) kasaba (duvarsız), duvarsız köy.
H6520: köy Paraz'ın aynısından; yargıçlık, yani Liderlik (aynı zamanda somut olarak reisler) - köy.
H6521: köy Veya prowziy {per-o-zee'}; prazah'tan; rustik bir köy.
H6522: Perizzit Praziy için; açık ülkenin sakini; bir Perizzit, Kenan kabilelerinden biri - Perizzit.
H6523: barzele karşılık gelen demir (Aramice); demir - demir.
H6524: yurt dışında, bol bol çiçek aç, yeşer, tomurcuklan, yeşer, uç, büyü, İlkel bir kök; tomurcuk olarak ortaya çıkmak, yani Bloom; genel olarak yayılmak; özellikle uçmak (kanatları uzatmak gibi); mecazi olarak, gelişmek - X yurt dışında, bol miktarda, çiçek açmak, açılmak (dışarı çıkmak), tomurcuklanmak, gelişmek, uçmak, büyümek, yayılmak, bahar (yukarı).
H6525: çiçek, tomurcuk, çiçek Paraşütten; bir kaliks (doğal veya yapay); genellikle çiçeklenme - çiçek açma, tomurcuk, çiçek.
H6526: gençlik Paraşütten; nesil, yani bir kuluçka - gençlik.
H6527: İlkel bir kökü söyleyin; kelimeleri dağıtmak, yani Prate (veya uğultu) - ilahi söylemek.
H6528: üzüm Parattan; başıboş veya tek bir meyve - üzüm.
H6529: dal, köknar meyvesi, ödül Parah'tan; meyve (kelimenin tam anlamıyla veya mecazi olarak) -- dal, ((ilk-)) meyve((-ful))), ödül.
H6530: yok edici, yırtıcı, soyguncu Paratlardan; şiddetli, yani bir tiran - yok edici, açgözlü, soyguncu.
H6531: zulüm, sertlik Parçalanmak anlamındaki kullanılmayan bir kökten; kırılma, yani Şiddet - zulüm, titizlik.
H6532: vail Perek ile aynı şeyin dişil aktif katılımcısı; bir separatrix, yani (kutsal) ekran - vail.
H6533: ilkel bir kökü parçalamak; yırtmak - parçalamak.
H6534: Fars kökenli Parmasta; Parmaşta, Haman'ın oğlu Parmasta.
H6535: Parnach Türetimi belirsiz; Parnak, İsrailli -- Parnach.
H6536: anlaşmak, bölmek, toynak sahibi olmak, parçalamak, yırtmak İlkel bir kök; parçalara ayırmak, yani (genellikle şiddet olmadan) bölmek, dağıtmak -- anlaşmak, bölmek, toynak sahibi olmak, bölmek, yırtmak.
H6537: bölme, Upharsin (Aramice) parac'a karşılık gelir; bölmek -- bölmek, (U-)pharsin.
H6538: pençe, kemikçik Parac'tan; bir pençe; aynı zamanda bir tür kartal; pençe, kemikçik.
H6539: İran, Yabancı kökenli Persler; Paras (yani Pers), sakinleri de dahil olmak üzere bir Doğu ülkesi - Persler, Persler.
H6540: Persler, Persler (Aramice) Parac'a karşılık gelir -- Persler, Persler.
H6541: pençe, yarık ayaklı, toynak Dişil perec; bir pençe veya bölünmüş toynak - pençe, (yarık) ayaklı, toynak.
H6542: Parac'tan İran Patriği; bir Parsite (yani Pers) veya Peres sakini - Pers.
H6544: avenge, avoid, bare, go back, make naked, perish, A primitive root; to loosen; by implication, to expose, dismiss; figuratively, absolve, begin -- avenge, avoid, bare, go back, let, (make) naked, set at nought, perish, refuse, uncover.
H6545: locks From para'; the hair (as dishevelled) -- locks.
H6546: avenging, revenge Feminine of pera' (in the sense of beginning); leadership (plural concretely, leaders) -- + avenging, revenge.
H6547: Pharaoh Of Egyptian derivation; Paroh, a general title of Egyptian kings -- Pharaoh.
H6548: Pharaoh-hophra Of Egyptian derivation; Paroh- Chophra, an Egyptian king -- Pharaoh-hophra.
H6549: Paroh-Nekoh or, an Egyptian kingOr Parpoh Nkow {par-o' nek-o'}; of Egyptian derivation; Paroh-Nekoh (or -Neko), an Egyptian king:
H6550: flea Probably from para' and ash; a flea (as the isolated insect) -- flea.
H6551: Parosh, Pharosh The same as par'osh; Parosh, the name of our Israelite -- Parosh, Pharosh.
H6552: Pirathon From par'ah; chieftaincy; Pirathon, a place in Palestine -- Pirathon.
H6553: Pirathonite Or Pirathoniy {pir-aw-tho-nee'}; patrial from Pir'athown; a Pirathonite or inhabitant of Pirathon -- Pirathonite.
H6554: Pharpar Probably from parar in the sense of rushing; rapid; Parpar, a river of Syria -- Pharpar.
H6555: abroad, make a breach, break away, down burst out, come spread abroad, compel, disperse, grow, A primitive root; to break out (in many applications, direct and indirect, literal and figurative) -- X abroad, (make a) breach, break (away, down, -er, forth, in, up), burst out, come (spread) abroad, compel, disperse, grow, increase, open, press, scatter, urge.
H6556: breach, breaking forth in, forth, gap From parats; a break (literally or figuratively) -- breach, breaking forth (in), forth, gap.
H6557: Perez, Pharez The same as perets; Perets, the name of two Israelites -- Perez, Pharez.
H6558: Pharzites Patronymically from Perets; a Partsite (collectively) or descendants of Perets -- Pharzites.
H6559: Perazim Plural of perets; breaks; Peratsim, a mountain in Palestine -- Perazim.
H6560: Perez-uzza From perets and Uzza'; break of Uzza; Perets-Uzza, a place in Palestine -- Perez-uzza.
H6561: break off, deliver, redeem, rend in pieces, tear in pieces A primitive root; to break off or crunch; figuratively, to deliver -- break (off), deliver, redeem, rend (in pieces), tear in pieces.
H6562: break off (Aramaic) corresponding to paraq; to discontinue -- break off.
H6563: crossway, robbery From paraq; rapine; also a fork (in roads) -- crossway, robbery.
H6564: broth From paraq; soup (as full of crumbed meat) -- broth. See also marpe'.
H6565: break asunder, cast off, cause to cease, clean, defeat, disannul, disappoint, A primitive root; to break up (usually figuratively, i.e. To violate, frustrate -- X any ways, break (asunder), cast off, cause to cease, clean, defeat, disannul, disappoint, dissolve, divide, make of none effect, fail, frustrate, bring (come) to nought, utterly, make void.
H6566: break, chop in pieces, lay open, scatter, spread abroad, forth, selves, out, A primitive root; to break apart, disperse, etc. -- break, chop in pieces, lay open, scatter, spread (abroad, forth, selves, out), stretch (forth, out).
H6567: scatter, declare, distinctly, show, sting A primitive root; to separate, literally (to disperse) or figuratively (to specify); also (by implication) to wound -- scatter, declare, distinctly, shew, sting.
H6568: distinctly (Aramaic) corresponding to parash; to specify -- distinctly.
H6569: dung From parash; excrement (as eliminated) -- dung.
H6570: Peresh The same as peresh; Peresh, an Israelite -- Peresh.
H6571: horseman From parash; a steed (as stretched out to a vehicle, not single nor for mounting (compare cuwc)); also (by implication) a driver (in a chariot), i.e. (collectively) cavalry -- horseman.
H6572: copy Or pathshegen {path-sheh'-gen}; of foreign origin; a transcript -- copy.
H6574: dirt Perhaps by compounding parash and parad (in the sense of straddling) (compare parshez); the crotch (or anus) -- dirt.
H6575: declaration, sum From parash; exposition -- declaration, sum.
H6576: spread A root apparently formed by compounding parash and that of paraz (compare parshdon); to expand -- spread.
H6577: Parshandatha Of Persian origin; Parshandatha, a son of Haman -- Parshandatha.
H6578: Euphrates From an unused root meaning to break forth; rushing; Perath (i.e. Euphrates), a river of the East -- Euphrates.
H6579: most noble, prince Of Persian origin; a grandee -- (most) noble, prince.
H6580: extremity Probably from an unused root meaning to disintegrate; stupidity (as a result of grossness or of degeneracy) -- extremity.
H6581: spread A primitive root; to spread -- spread.
H6582: pull in pieces A primitive root; to tear in pieces -- pull in pieces.
H6583: Pashur Probably from pashach; liberation; Pashchur, the name of four Israelites -- Pashur.
H6584: fall upon, flay, invade, make an invasion, pull off, put off, make a road, run upon, A primitive root; to spread out (i.e. Deploy in hostile array); by analogy, to strip (i.e. Unclothe, plunder, flay, etc.) -- fall upon, flay, invade, make an invasion, pull off, put off, make a road, run upon, rush, set, spoil, spread selves (abroad), strip (off, self).
H6585: go A primitive root; to stride (from spreading the legs), i.e. Rush upon -- go.
H6586: offend, rebel, revolt, transgression, A primitive root (identical with pasa' through the idea of expansion); to break away (from just authority), i.e. Trespass, apostatize, quarrel -- offend, rebel, revolt, transgress(-ion, -or).
H6587: step From pasa'; a stride -- step.
H6588: rebellion, sin, transgression, trespass From pasha'; a revolt (national, moral or religious) -- rebellion, sin, transgression, trespass.
H6589: open wide A primitive root; to dispart (the feet or lips), i.e. Become licentious -- open (wide).
H6590: make interpretations, interpreting (Aramaic) corresponding to pathar; to interpret -- make (interpretations), interpreting.
H6591: interpretation (Aramaic) from pshar; an interpretation -- interpretation.
H6593: flax, linen From the same as pash as in the sense of comminuting; linen (i.e. The thread, as carded) -- flax, linen.
H6594: flax, tow Feminine of pishteh; flax; by implication, a wick -- flax, tow.
H6595: meat, morsel, piece From pathath; a bit -- meat, morsel, piece.
H6596: hinge, secret participle Or pothah (Ezek. 13:19) {po-thaw'}; from an unused root meaning to open; a hole, i.e. Hinge or the female pudenda -- hinge, secret participle
H6597: straightway, suddenly Or pith.om {pith-ome'}; from petha'; instantly -- straightway, sudden(-ly).
H6598: portion provision of meat Of Persian origin; a dainty -- portion (provision) of meat.
H6599: decree, sentence Of Persian origin; a (judicial) sentence -- decree, sentence.
H6600: answer, letter, matter, word (Aramaic) corresponding to pithgam; a word, answer, letter or decree -- answer, letter, matter, word.
H6601: allure, deceive, enlarge, entice, flatter, persuade, silly one A primitive root; to open, i.e. Be (causatively, make) roomy; usually figuratively (in a mental or moral sense) to be (causatively, make) simple or (in a sinister way) delude -- allure, deceive, enlarge, entice, flatter, persuade, silly (one).
H6602: Pethuel From pathah and 'el; enlarged of God; Pethuel, an Israelite -- Pethuel.
H6603: carved work, engraving, Or pittuach {pit-too'-akh; passive participle of pathach; sculpture (in low or high relief or even intaglio) -- carved (work) (are, en-)grave(-ing, -n).
H6604: Pethor Of foreign origin; Pethor, a place in Mesopotamia -- Pethor.
H6605: appear, break forth, draw out, let go free, engrave, loose self, be, be set opening, A primitive root; to open wide (literally or figuratively); specifically, to loosen, begin, plough, carve -- appear, break forth, draw (out), let go free, (en-)grave(-n), loose (self), (be, be set) open(-ing), put off, ungird, unstop, have vent.
H6606: open (Aramaic) corresponding to pathach; to open -- open.
H6607: door, entering in, entrance ry, gate, opening, place From pathach; an opening (literally), i.e. Door (gate) or entrance way -- door, entering (in), entrance (-ry), gate, opening, place.
H6608: entrance From pathach; opening (figuratively) i.e. Disclosure -- entrance.
H6609: drawn sword From pathach; something opened, i.e. A drawn sword -- drawn sword.
H6610: opening From pathach; opening (the act) -- open(-ing).
H6611: Pethakiah From pathach and Yahh; Jah has opened; Pethachjah, the name of four Israelites -- Pethakiah.
H6612: foolish, simplicity, one Or pethiy {peh'-thee}; or pthaeiy {peth-aw-ee'}; from pathah; silly (i.e. Seducible) -- foolish, simple(-icity, one).
H6613: breadth (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to pathah; open, i.e. (as noun) width -- breadth.
H6614: stomacher Of uncertain derivation; probably a figured mantle for holidays -- stomacher.
H6615: simple From pthiy; silliness (i.e. Seducibility) -- simple.
H6616: bound, bracelet, lace, line, ribbon, thread, wire From pathal; twine -- bound, bracelet, lace, line, ribband, thread, wire.
H6617: show self froward, show self unsavoury, wrestle A primitive root; to twine, i.e. (literally) to struggle or (figuratively) be (morally) tortuous -- (shew self) froward, shew self unsavoury, wrestle.
H6618: crooked From pathal; tortuous (i.e. Crafty) -- crooked.
H6619: Pithom Of Egyptian derivation; Pithom, a place in Egypt -- Pithom.
H6620: adder From an unused root meaning to twist; an asp (from its contortions) -- adder.
H6621: at an instant, suddenly, very From an unused root meaning to open (the eyes); a wink, i.e. Moment (compare pith'owm) (used only (with or without preposition) adverbially, quickly or unexpectedly) -- at an instant, suddenly, very.
H6622: interpretation, A primitive root; to open up, i.e. (figuratively) interpret (a dream) -- interpret(-ation, -er).
H6623: interpretation Or pithron {pith-rone'}; from pathar; interpretation (of a dream) -- interpretation.
H6624: Pathros Of Egyptian derivation; Pathros, a part of Egypt -- Pathros.
H6625: Pathrusim Patrial from Pathrowc; a Pathrusite, or inhabitant of Pathros -- Pathrusim.
H6626: participle A primitive root; to open, i.e. Break -- participle
H6627: excrementFrom yatsa'; issue, i.e. (human) excrement -- that (which) cometh from (out).
H6628: shady tree From an unused root meaning to be slender; the lotus tree -- shady tree.
H6629: small cattle, flock, lamb, sheepcote, Or tsaown (Psalm 144:13) {tseh-one'}; from an unused root meaning to migrate; a collective name for a flock (of sheep or goats); also figuratively (of men) -- (small) cattle, flock (+ -s), lamb (+ -s), sheep((-cote, -fold, -shearer, -herds)).
H6630: Zaanan From the same as tso'n used denominatively; sheep pasture; Zaanan, a place in Palestine -- Zaanan.
H6631: that which cometh forth out, offspring From yatsa'; issue, i.e. Produce, children -- that which cometh forth (out), offspring.
H6632: covered, litter, tortoise From an unused root meaning to establish; a palanquin or canopy (as a fixture); also a species of lizard (probably as clinging fast) -- covered, litter, tortoise.
H6633: assemble, fight, perform, muster, wait upon, war A primitive root; to mass (an army or servants) -- assemble, fight, perform, muster, wait upon, war.
H6634: will, would (Aramaic) corresponding to pithrown in the figurative sense of summoning one's wishes; to please -- will, would.
H6635: appointed time, army, battle, company, host, service, soldiers, waiting upon, Or (feminine) tsbadah {tseb-aw-aw'}; from tsaba'; a mass of persons (or figuratively, things), especially reg. Organized for war (an army); by implication, a campaign, literally or figuratively (specifically, hardship, worship) -- appointed time, (+) army, (+) battle, company, host, service, soldiers, waiting upon, war(-fare).
H6636: Zeboiim, Zeboim Or (more correctly) Tsbiyiym {tseb-ee-yeem'}; or Tsbiyim {tseb-ee-yeem'}; plural of tsbiy; gazelles; Tseboim or Tsebijim, a place in Palestine -- Zeboiim, Zeboim.
H6637: Zobebah Feminine active participle of the same as tsab; the canopier (with the article); Tsobebah, an Israelitess -- Zobebah.
H6638: fight swell A primitive root; to amass, i.e. Grow turgid; specifically, to array an army against -- fight swell.
H6640: purpose (Aramaic) from tsba'; properly, will; concretely, an affair (as a matter of determination) -- purpose.
H6641: speckled Passive participle of the same as tseba'; dyed (in stripes), i.e. The hyena -- speckled.
H6642: reach A primitive root; to grasp, i.e. Hand out -- reach.
H6643: beautifulty, glorious, goodly, pleasant, roebuck From tsabah in the sense of prominence; splendor (as conspicuous); also a gazelle (as beautiful) -- beautiful(-ty), glorious, goodly, pleasant, roe(-buck).
H6644: Zibia For Tsibyah; Tsibja, an Israelite -- Zibia.
H6645: Zibiah For tsbiyah; Tsibjah, an Israelitess -- Zibiah.
H6646: roe Feminine of tsbiy; a female gazelle -- roe.
H6647: wet (Aramaic) a root corresponding to that of tseba'; to dip -- wet.
H6648: divers, colors From an unused root meaning to dip (into coloring fluid); a dye -- divers, colours.
H6649: Zibeon From the same as tseba'; variegated; Tsibon, an Idumaean -- Zibeon.
H6650: Zeboim Plural of tsabuwa'; hyenas; Tseboim, a place in Palestine -- Zeboim.
H6651: gather together, heap up, lay up A primitive root; to aggregate -- gather (together), heap (up), lay up.
H6652: heap From Par'osh; a pile -- heap.
H6653: handful From an unused root apparently meaning to grip; a lock of stalks -- handful.
H6654: beside Contr. From an unused root meaning to sidle off; a side; figuratively, an adversary -- (be-)side.
H6655: against, concerning (Aramaic) corresponding to tsad; used adverbially (with preposition) at or upon the side of -- against, concerning.
H6656: doğru.(Aramice) niyet anlamında tsadah'a karşılık gelen, kullanılmayan bir kökten; (kötü) bir tasarım – doğru.
H6657: Zedad Tsad'ın aynısından; bir dış cephe kaplaması; Tsedad, Filistin yakınlarında bir yer -- Zedad.
H6658: yok et, avla, pusuya yat İlkel bir kök; kovalamak; ima ederek, ıssız bırakmak - yok etmek, avlamak, pusuya yatmak.
H6659: Zadok Tsadaq'tan; Sadece; Tsadok, sekiz ya da dokuz İsraillinin adı - Zadok.
H6660: pusuda yatmak Tsadah'dan; tasarım (tsda'yı karşılaştırın) - pusuda bekliyor.
H6661: Ziddim Tsad'ın çoğulu; taraflar; Tsiddim (makaleyle birlikte), Filistin'de bir yer -- Ziddim.
H6662: adil, meşru, salih adam Tsadaq'tan; adil -- adil, yasal, adil (insan).
H6663: Nefsini temizle, temizle, ol, adaleti doğruya çevir İlkel bir kök; (nedensel olarak, doğru olmak) (ahlaki veya adli anlamda) - kendini temizlemek, temizlemek, (olmak, yapmak) adil (-buz, -ifi, -kendini), (olmak) doğru(-luk).
H6664: adalet, haklı dava Tsadaq'tan; hak (doğal, ahlaki veya hukuki); ayrıca (soyut olarak) eşitlik veya (mecazi olarak) refah -- X çift, (X tamamıyla olan) adil(-buz), ((un-))doğru(-eous) (neden, -ly, - ness).
H6665: doğruluk (Aramice) tsdaqah'a karşılık gelir; iyilik -- doğruluk.
H6666: adalet, orta, salih amel, tsadaktan; doğruluk (soyut olarak), öznel olarak (doğruluk), nesnel olarak (adalet), ahlaki olarak (erdem) veya mecazi olarak (refah) -- adalet, orta derecede, doğru(-eous) (hareket, -ly,-ness).
H6667: Sidkiah, Zidkijah Veya Tsidqiyahuw {tsid-kee-yaw'-hoo}; tsedeq ve Yahh'tan; Jah'ın hakkı; Tsidkijah, altı İsraillinin adı - Sidkiya, Zidkijah.
H6668: ince İlkel bir kök; parıldamak, yani altın renginde olmak - X ince.
H6670: böğür, yüksek sesle bağır, kaldır, kişne, sevin, parıldat, bağır İlk kök; parlamak, yani (mecazi olarak) neşeli olmak; aktarım yoluyla Net ses çıkarmak için (çeşitli hayvan veya insan ifadelerinden) - böğürmek, yüksek sesle ağlamak (dışarı), kaldırmak, kişnemek, sevinmek, parlamak, bağırmak.
H6671: yağı ilkel bir kök haline getirin; parlamak; sadece Yitshar'dan isim olarak kullanılır, yağı çıkarmak -- yağ yapmak için.
H6672: öğlen, öğlen penceresi Tsahar'dan; bir ışık (yani Pencere): ikili çift ışık, yani Öğlen -- öğlen, öğlen(-gün, -gelgit), pencere.

H7058: flour, meal From an unused root probably meaning to grind; flour -- flour, meal.
H7059: cut down, fill with wrinkles A primitive root; to pluck, i.e. Destroy -- cut down, fill with wrinkles.
H7060: hew down, wither A primitive root; to wither -- hew down, wither.
H7061: take an handful A primitive root; to grasp with the hand -- take an handful.
H7062: handful From qamats; a grasp, i.e. Handful -- handful.
H7063: thorn From the same as qimmowsh; a prickly plant -- thorn.
H7064: nest, room Contracted from qanan; a nest (as fixed), sometimes including the nestlings; figuratively, a chamber or dwelling -- nest, room.
H7065: be envious, be move to, provoke to jealousy, very, be zealous A primitive root; to be (causatively, make) zealous, i.e. (in a bad sense) jealous or envious -- (be) envy(-ious), be (move to, provoke to) jealous(-y), very, (be) zeal(-ous).
H7066: buy (Aramaic) corresponding to qanah; to purchase -- buy.
H7067: jealous From qana'; jealous -- jealous. Compare qannow'.
H7068: envyied, jealousy, zeal From qana'; jealousy or envy -- envy(-ied), jealousy, sake, zeal.
H7069: attain, buyer, teach to keep cattle, get, provoke to jealousy, possessor, purchaseA primitive root; to erect, i.e. Create; by extension, to procure, especially by purchase (causatively, sell); by implication to own -- attain, buy(-er), teach to keep cattle, get, provoke to jealousy, possess(-or), purchase, recover, redeem, surely, verily.
H7070: balance, bone, branch, cane, reed, spearman, stalkFrom qanah; a reed (as erect); by resemblance a rod (especially for measuring), shaft, tube, stem, the radius (of the arm), beam (of a steelyard) -- balance, bone, branch, calamus, cane, reed, spearman, stalk.
H7071: Kanah Feminine of qaneh; reediness; Kanah, the name of a stream and of a place in Palestine -- Kanah.
H7072: jealous For qanna'; jealous or angry -- jealous.
H7073: Kenaz Probably from an unused root meaning to hunt; hunter; Kenaz, the name of an Edomite and of two Israelites -- Kenaz.
H7074: Kenezite, Kenizzites Patronymic from Qnaz, a Kenizzite or descendant of Kenaz -- Kenezite, Kenizzites.
H7075: getting, goods, with money, riches, substance From qanah; creation, i.e. (concretely) creatures; also acquisition, purchase, wealth -- getting, goods, with money, riches, substance.
H7076: cinnamon From an unused root (meaning to erect); cinnamon bark (as in upright rolls) -- cinnamon.
H7077: make A primitive root; to erect; but used only as denominative from qen; to nestle, i.e. Build or occupy as a nest -- make...nest.
H7078: end From an unused root probably meaning to wrench; perversion -- end.
H7079: Kenath From qanah; possession; Kenath, a place East of the Jordan -- Kenath.
H7080: diviner prudent, soothsayer, use divination A primitive root; properly, to distribute, i.e. Determine by lot or magical scroll; by implication, to divine -- divine(-r, -ation), prudent, soothsayer, use (divination).
H7081: divination, divine sentence, witchcraft From qacam; a lot: also divination (including its fee), oracle -- (reward of) divination, divine sentence, witchcraft.
H7082: cut off A primitive root; to lop off -- cut off.
H7083: inkhorn From the same as kowc (or as qashah); properly, a cup, i.e. An ink-stand -- inkhorn.
H7084: Keilah Perhaps from qala' in the sense of inclosing; citadel; Keilah, a place in Palestine -- Keilah.
H7085: mark From the same as Qowa'; an incision or gash -- + mark.
H7086: charger, dish Probably from qara'; a bowl (as cut out hollow) -- charger, dish.
H7087: congeal, curdle, dark, settle A primitive root; to shrink, i.e. Thicken (as unracked wine, curdled milk, clouded sky, frozen water) -- congeal, curdle, dark, settle.
H7088: cut off A primitive root; to contract, i.e. Roll together -- cut off.
H7089: destruction From qaphad; shrinking, i.e., terror -- destruction.
H7090: bittern Or qippod {kip-pode'}; from qaphad; a species of bird, perhaps the bittern (from its contracted form) -- bittern.
H7091: great owl From an unused root meaning to contract, i.e. Spring forward; an arrow-snake (as darting on its prey) -- great owl.
H7092: shut up, skip, stop, take out of the way A primitive root; to draw together, i.e. Close; by implication, to leap (by contracting the limbs); specifically, to die (from gathering up the feet) -- shut (up), skip, stop, take out of the way.
H7093: after, utmost border, end, infinite, process Contracted from qatsats; an extremity; adverbially (with prepositional prefix) after -- + after, (utmost) border, end, (in-)finite, process.
H7094: cut down, shorn A primitive root; to clip, or (generally) chop -- cut down, shorn.
H7095: bottom, size From qatsab; shape (as if cut out); base (as if there cut off) -- bottom, size.
H7096: cut off, cut short, scrape off A primitive root; to cut off; (figuratively) to destroy; (partially) to scrape off -- cut off, cut short, scrape (off).
H7097: after, border, brim, brink, edge, end, infinite, frontier, Or (negative only) qetseh {kay'-tseh}; from qatsah; an extremity (used in a great variety of applications and idioms; compare qets) -- X after, border, brim, brink, edge, end, (in-)finite, frontier, outmost coast, quarter, shore, (out-)side, some, ut(-ter-)most (part).
H7098: coast, corner, lowest, uttermost participle Feminine of qatseh; a termination (used like qatseh) -- coast, corner, (selv-)edge, lowest, (uttermost) participle
H7099: end, edge, uttermost participle And (feminine) qitsvah {kits-vaw'}; from qatsah; a limit (used like qatseh, but with less variety) -- end, edge, uttermost participle
H7100: fitches From an unused root apparently meaning to incise; fennelflower (from its pungency) -- fitches.
H7101: captain, guide, prince, ruler From qatsah in the sense of determining; a magistrate (as deciding) or other leader -- captain, guide, prince, ruler. Compare Eth Qatsiyn. Qatsiyn
H7102: cassia From qatsa'; cassia (as peeled; plural the bark) -- cassia.
H7103: Kezia The same as qtsiy'ah; Ketsiah, a daughter of Job -- Kezia.
H7104: Keziz From qatsats; abrupt; Keziz, a valley in Palestine -- Keziz.
H7105: bough, branch, harvest man From qatsar; severed, i.e. Harvest (as reaped), the crop, the time, the reaper, or figuratively; also a limb (of a tree, or simply foliage) -- bough, branch, harvest (man).
H7106: cause to scrape, corner A primitive root; to strip off, i.e. (partially) scrape; by implication, to segregate (as an angle) -- cause to scrape, corner.
H7107: be angry, displease, fret self, provoke to wrath come, be wroth A primitive root; to crack off, i.e. (figuratively) burst out in rage -- (be) anger(-ry), displease, fret self, (provoke to) wrath (come), be wroth.
H7108: be furious (Aramaic) corresponding to qatsaph; to become enraged -- be furious.
H7110: foam, indignation, sore, wrath From qatsaph; a splinter (as chipped off); figuratively, rage or strife -- foam, indignation, sore, wrath.
H7111: barked From qatsaph; a fragment -- bark(-ed).
H7112: cut asunder, in pieces, in sunder, off, utmost A primitive root; to chop off (literally or figuratively) -- cut (asunder, in pieces, in sunder, off), utmost.
H7113: cut off (Aramaic) corresponding to qatsats -- cut off.
H7114: cut down, much discouraged, grieve, harvestman, loathe, mourn, reaper, A primitive root; to dock off, i.e. Curtail (transitive or intransitive, literal or figurative); especially to harvest (grass or grain) -- X at all, cut down, much discouraged, grieve, harvestman, lothe, mourn, reap(-er), (be, wax) short(-en, -er), straiten, trouble, vex.
H7115: anguish From qatsar; shortness (of spirit), i.e. Impatience -- anguish.
H7116: few, hasty, small, soon From qatsar; short (whether in size, number, life, strength or temper) -- few, hasty, small, soon.
H7117: end, part, some From qatsah; a termination (literally or figuratively); also (by implication) a portion; adverbially (with prepositional prefix) after -- end, part, some.
H7118: end, partly (Aramaic) corresponding to qtsath -- end, partly.
H7119: cold, excellent Contracted from an unused root meaning to chill; cool; figuratively, quiet -- cold, excellent (from the margin).
H7120: cold From the same as qar; cold -- cold.
H7121: bewray self, that are bidden, call for, forth, self, upon, cry unto, be famous, A primitive root (rather identical with qara' through the idea of accosting a person met); to call out to (i.e. Properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications) -- bewray (self), that are bidden, call (for, forth, self, upon), cry (unto), (be) famous, guest, invite, mention, (give) name, preach, (make) proclaim(- ation), pronounce, publish, read, renowned, say.
H7122: befall, by chance, cause to come upon, fall out, happen, meet A primitive root: to encounter, whether accidentally or in a hostile manner -- befall, (by) chance, (cause to) come (upon), fall out, happen, meet.
H7123: call, cry, read (Aramaic) corresponding to qara' -- call, cry, read.
H7124: partridge Properly, active participle of qara'; a caller, i.e. Partridge (from its cry) -- partridge. See also Qowre'.
H7125: against he come, help, meet, seek, to, in the way From qara'; an encountering, accidental, friendly or hostile (also adverbially, opposite) -- X against (he come), help, meet, seek, to, in the way.
H7126: cause to approach, cause to bring forth, near, cause to come near, nighA primitive root; to approach (causatively, bring near) for whatever purpose -- (cause to) approach, (cause to) bring (forth, near), (cause to) come (near, nigh), (cause to) draw near (nigh), go (near), be at hand, join, be near, offer, present, produce, make ready, stand, take.
H7127: approach, come near, nigh, draw near (Aramaic) corresponding to qarab -- approach, come (near, nigh), draw near.
H7128: battle, war From qarab; hostile encounter -- battle, war.
H7130: among, before, bowels, unto charge, eat up, heart, him, in, From qarab; properly, the nearest part, i.e. The center, whether literal, figurative or adverbial (especially with preposition) -- X among, before, bowels, unto charge, + eat (up), heart, him, in, inward (X -ly, part, -s, thought), midst, + out of, purtenance, therein, through, within self.
H7131: approach, come near, nigh, draw near From qarab; near -- approach, come (near, nigh), draw near.
H7132: approaching, draw near From qarab; approach -- approaching, draw near.
H7133: oblation, that is offered, offering Or qurban {koor-bawn'}; from qarab; something brought near the altar, i.e. A sacrificial present -- oblation, that is offered, offering.
H7134: ax Perhaps from qadam in the sense of striking upon; an axe -- ax.
H7135: cold Feminine of qar; coolness -- cold.
H7136: appoint, lay make beams, befall, bring, come to pass unto, floor, hap was, happen unto, A primitive root; to light upon (chiefly by accident); causatively, to bring about; specifically, to impose timbers (for roof or floor) -- appoint, lay (make) beams, befall, bring, come (to pass unto), floor, (hap) was, happen (unto), meet, send good speed.
H7137: uncleanness by chance, accidental disqualificationFrom qarah; an (unfortunate) occurrence, i.e. Some accidental (ceremonial) disqualification -- uncleanness that chanceth.
H7138: allied, approach, at hand, any of kin, that is near of kin, neighbor, that is next, Or qarob {kaw-robe'}; from qarab; near (in place, kindred or time) -- allied, approach, at hand, + any of kin, kinsfold(-sman), (that is) near (of kin), neighbour, (that is) next, (them that come) nigh (at hand), more ready, short(-ly).
H7139: make self bald A primitive root; to depilate -- make (self) bald.
H7140: crystal, frost, ice Or qorach {ko'-rakh}; from qarach; ice (as if bald, i.e. Smooth); hence, hail; by resemblance, rock crystal -- crystal, frost, ice.
H7141: Korah From qarach; ice; Korach, the name of two Edomites and three Israelites -- Korah.
H7142: bald head From qarach; bald (on the back of the head) -- bald (head).
H7143: Careah, Kareah From qarach; bald; Kareach, an Israelite -- Careah, Kareah.
H7144: baldness, utterly Or qorcha; (Ezek. 27:31) {kor-khaw'}; from qarach; baldness -- bald(-ness), utterly.
H7145: Korahite, Korathite, sons of Kore, Korhite Patronymic from Qorach; a Korchite (collectively) or descendants of Korach -- Korahite, Korathite, sons of Kore, Korhite.
H7146: bald head, bare within From qarach; a bald spot (on the back of the head); figuratively, a threadbare spot (on the back side of the cloth) -- bald head, bare within.
H7147: contrary From qarah; hostile encounter -- contrary.
H7148: famous, renowned From qara'; called, i.e. Select -- famous, renowned.
H7149: city (Aramaic) or qiryah (Aramaic) {keer-yaw'}; corresponding to qiryah -- city.
H7150: preaching From qara'; a proclamation -- preaching.
H7151: city From qarah in the sense of flooring, i.e. Building; a city -- city.
H7152: Kerioth, Kirioth Plural of qiryah; buildings; Kerioth, the name of two places in Palestine -- Kerioth, Kirioth.
H7153: Kirjath-arba Or (with the article interposed) Qiryath ha- Arbaw (Neh. 11:25) {keer-yath' haw-ar-bah'}; from qiryah and Arba' or arba'; city of Arba, or city of the four (giants); Kirjath-Arba or Kirjath-ha-Arba, a place in Palestine -- Kirjath-arba.
H7154: Kirjath-baal From qiryah and Ba'al; city of Baal; Kirjath-Baal, a place in Palestine -- Kirjath-baal.
H7155: Kirjath-huzoth From qiryah and the feminine plural of chuwts; city of streets; Kirjath-Chutsoth, a place in Moab -- Kirjath-huzoth.
H7156: Kiriathaim, Kirjathaim Dual of qiryah; double city; Kirjathaim, the name of two placed in Palestine -- Kiriathaim, Kirjathaim.
H7157: Kirjath, Kirjath-jearim, Kirjath-arim Or (Jer. 26:20) with the article interposed; or (Josh. 18:28) simply the former part of the word; or Qiryath tariym {keer-yath' aw-reem'}; from qiryah and the plural of ya'ar or iyr; city of forests, or city of towns; Kirjath-Jearim or Kirjath-Arim, a place in Palestine -- Kirjath, Kirjath-jearim, Kirjath-arim.
H7158: Kirjath-sannah, Kirjath-sepher Or Qiryath Cepher {keer-yath' say-fer}; from qiryah and a simpler feminine from the same as cancin, or (for the latter name) cepher; city of branches, or of a book; Kirjath-Sannah or Kirjath-Sepher, a place in Palestine -- Kirjath-sannah, Kirjath-sepher.
H7159: cover A primitive root; to cover -- cover.
H7160: boynuzları var, parlıyor İlkel bir kök; itmek veya kan dökmek; yalnızca boynuz atmak için qeren'den isim olarak kullanılır; mecazi olarak ışınlar - boynuzları vardır, parlarlar.
H7161: tepe, boynuz Karandan; bir korna (çıkıntılı olarak); dolaylı olarak bir şişe, kornet; benzerlik göstererek. Bir filin dişi (yani Fildişi), bir köşe (sunağın), bir zirve (bir dağın), bir ışın (ışık); mecazi olarak güç -- X tepesi, korna.
H7162: qeren'e karşılık gelen boynuz, kornet (Aramice); bir korna (kelimenin tam anlamıyla veya ses için) - korna, kornet.
H7163: Keren-happuch Qeren ve puwk'tan; kozmetik boynuzu; Keren-hap-Puk, Eyüp'ün kızlarından biri - Keren-happuch.
H7164: eğilme İlkel bir kök; düzgün bir şekilde çıkıntı yapmak; yalnızca qerec'ten (kara' ile aliterasyon için) kambur olmak, yani kambur olmak -- eğilmek kelimesinin isim olarak kullanılır.
H7165: Tache Karaç'tan; bir topuz veya emniyet pimi (şişkin formundan) - tache.
H7166: ayak Karaç'tan; bir ayak bileği (bir çıkıntı veya eklem olarak) -- ayak.
H7167: İlkel bir kökü kesin, parçalayın, mutlaka yırtın; kelimenin tam anlamıyla ya da mecazi olarak parçalamak (kötülemek, gözleri büyütüyormuş gibi boyamak) - kesmek, parçalamak, kesinlikle yırtmak.
H7168: parça, paçavra Kara'dan; bir paçavra — parça, paçavra.
H7169: biçimlendir, hareket ettir, göz kırp İlkel bir kök; kıstırmak, yani (kısmen) dudakları ısırmak, gözlerini kırpmak (kötü niyetli bir jest olarak) veya (tamamen) sıkmak (ondan bir kap oluşturmak için bir parça kil) - biçimlendirmek, hareket ettirmek, göz kırpmak.
H7170: suçlamak (Aramice) biraz anlamında qerets'e karşılık gelir (herhangi birinin "lokmalarını yemek", yani onu (mecazi olarak) iftirayla çiğnemek) -- + suçlamak.
H7171: yıkım Karatlardan; yok etme (sanki daraltma yoluyla) -- yok etme.
H7172: alt, zeminin bir tarafı Kara'dan; bir binanın veya denizin zemini (parçalardan veya tesseroelerden oluşan bir döşeme gibi), taban, (X bir tarafı) zemin.
H7173: Karkaa Karka' ile aynı; zemin kat; Karka (makale önekiyle birlikte), Filistin'de bir yer -- Karkaa.
H7174: Karkor Quwr'dan; temel; Karkor, Ürdün'ün doğusunda bir yer -- Karkor.
H7175: tezgah, tahta Ayrılmak anlamına gelen kullanılmayan bir kökten; bir levha veya tahta; dolaylı olarak, bir geminin güvertesi - tezgah, tahta.
H7176: şehir Bina anlamında karadan; bir şehir -- şehir.
H7177: Kartah Qereth'ten; şehir; Kartah, Filistin'de bir yer -- Kartah.
H7178: Kartan Qereth'ten; şehir arsası; Kartan, Filistin'de bir yer -- Kartan.
H7180: salatalık Kullanılmayan bir kökten (sert olmak anlamına gelir); bir salatalık (sindirim güçlüğünden dolayı) -- salatalık.
H7181: katılmak, dinletmek, kulak vermek, eğilmek, iyi işaretlemek, dikkate almak İlkel bir kök; kulakları dikmek, yani Hearken - katılmak, duymak (-ken), kulak vermek, eğilmek, işaretlemek (iyi), saygı duymak.
H7182: özenle, işiterek, çok önemseyerek, kashab'tan bakanları; bir kulak verme - X özenle, işiterek, çok önemseyerek, bunu dikkate aldı.
H7183: özenli Veya qashshub {kash-shoob'}; kashab'tan; kulak verme -- dikkat(-ive).
H7184: kapak, fincan Veya kasvah {kas-vaw'}; yuvarlak olmak anlamına gelen kullanılmayan bir kökten; sürahi (şekline göre) -- kapak, bardak.
H7185: zalim ol, daha şiddetli ol, acı ver, içinde ol, var ol, görün, sertleş, emek ver, ağrılı ol, İlkel bir kök; uygun şekilde, yoğun olmak, yani Sert veya şiddetli (çeşitli uygulamalarda) - zalim ol, daha sert ol, kederli ol, ol ((sor), içinde ol, sahip ol, görün, olurdu) zor(-en, (emek), -ly, şey), ağrılı ol, (ol, yap) sert(-en, (-boyunlu)).
H7186: kaba, zalim, kederli, katı yürekli, şey, ağır, küstah, inatçı, Kaşeden; şiddetli (çeşitli uygulamalarda) - kaba, zalim, kederli, sert ((-yürekli), şey), ağır, + küstah, inatçı, galip gelen, kaba (-ly), ağrılı, kederli, katı ((boyunlu)) inatçı, + başı belada.
H7187: hakikat (Aramice) veya qshot (Aramice) {kesh-ote'}; qoshet'e karşılık gelen; sadakat -- gerçek.
H7188: sertleşmek İlkel bir kök; (nedensel olarak) duygusuz olmak - sertleşmek.
H7189: gerçek Veya qosht {kosht}; kullanılmayan bir kök anlamından dengeye; eşitlik (eşit olarak tartıldığında), yani Gerçeklik - gerçek.
H7191: Kishion, Keshon qshiy'den; sert zemin; Kishjon, Filistin'de bir yer -- Kishion, Keshon.
H7192: Kullanılmayan bir kökten bir parça para gümüşü (muhtemelen tartmak anlamına gelir); bir külçe (kesinlikle tahmin edildiği ve bir madeni para için damgalandığı üzere) - para parçası (gümüş).
H7193: posta, ölçek Kullanılmayan bir kökten çoğaltma yoluyla kabuk olarak şeyl; bir ölçek (balık); dolayısıyla bir posta ceketi (birleşik metal plakalardan oluşan veya bunlarla kaplanmış) - posta, pul.
H7194: bağlamak, komplo kurmak, bir araya getirmek, örmek, güçlendirmek, vatana ihanet İlkel bir kök: bağlamak, fiziksel olarak (kuşak, sınırlamak, sıkıştırmak) veya zihinsel olarak (aşkta, birlik) - bağlamak (bağlamak), (yapmak) komplo kurmak (-acy, -ator), bir araya gelmek, örmek, güçlendirmek, çalışmak (ihanet).
H7195: konfederasyon, komplo, ihanet Kaşar'dan; (yasadışı) bir ittifak - konfederasyon, komplo, ihanet.
H7196: kıyafet, saç bandı Kaşar'dan; (kadınlar için) (süslü) kuşak -- kıyafet, saç bandı.
H7197: kendilerini bir araya toplamak İlkel bir kök; kuraklık yüzünden bitkisiz kalmak; sadece kaş'tan isim olarak kullanılır; saman, anız veya odun aramak; mecazi olarak, bir araya gelmek - (kendilerini) (birlikte) toplamak.
H7198: okçu, ok, okçu, Eğilmenin (qowsh'un) orijinal anlamındaki kaşah'tan: atış için bir yay (dolayısıyla mecazi olarak güç) veya iris - X kemer(-er), + ok, yay((-man, -shot)).
H7199: okçu Yoğun (nominal olarak) qesheth'ten; okçu - X okçusu.
H7200: sebep önermek, kendini göstermek, başkalarını görmek, gözetlemek, bakmak, elbette düşünmek, bakmak, İlkel bir kök; Kelimenin tam anlamıyla veya mecazi olarak görmek (doğrudan ve zımni, geçişli, geçişsiz ve nedensel birçok uygulamada) - kendine tavsiyede bulunmak, görünmek, onaylamak, seyretmek, kesinlikle, düşünmek, ayırt etmek, (yapmak) zevk almak, deneyim sahibi olmak, bakmak, dikkat etmek, aslında, sevinçle, bakmak (birbirimize, diğerine, dışarıya, yukarıya, üzerine), işaretlemek, buluşmak, yakın olmak, algılamak, mevcut olmak, sağlamak, saygı duymak, saygı duymak (önceden,), sebep olmak, görmek (-r, -m, birbirimizi), göstermek (kendini), başkalarını görmek, (e-)casusluk yapmak, bakmak, elbette, düşünmek, görmek, vizyonlar.
H7201: glede Ra'ah'tan; bir yırtıcı kuş (keskin görüş açısına bakılırsa muhtemelen akbaba) - glede. Da'ah'ı karşılaştırın.
H7202: bkz. Ra'ah'tan; Görmek, yani Deneyimlemek -- bkz.
H7203: vizyon Ra'ah'ın aktif katılımcısı; bir kahin (çoğunlukla ifade edildiği gibi); ama aynı zamanda (soyut olarak) bir vizyon - vizyon.
H7204: Ro'eh için makaleyi içeren Haroeh; peygamber; Roeh, İsrailli -- Haroeh (makale dahil).
H7205: Reuben Ra'ah ve ben emir kipinden; bir oğul görüyorum; Reuben, Yakup'un oğlu - Reuben.
H7206: Reuben'in çocukları, Rubenliler, r'uwben'den soyadlı; Bir Rubenli veya Reuben'in soyundan gelenler - Reuben'in çocukları, Reubenliler.
H7207: işte Ra'ah'tan; görme, yani Memnuniyet - işte.
H7208: Reumah Ra'am'ın dişil pasif katılımcısı; kabarık; Reumah, Suriyeli bir kadın -- Reumah.
H7209: görünümlü cam Ra'ah'tan; bir ayna (görüldüğü gibi) -- görünümlü cam.
H7210: Ra'ah'tan köpüren göz kamaştırıcı şeye bakın; görme, ister soyut olarak (görme) ister somut olarak (bir gösteri) - dik dik bakmak, bakmak, (şunu) görmek.

H7586: Saul, Shaul Sha'al'in pasif katılımcısı; diye sordu; Şaul, bir Edomlu ve iki İsraillinin adı - Saul, Şaul.
H7587: Sitnan'dan Shaulites Patronimik; bir Şaullu veya Shaul'un soyundan gelen - Şaullular.
H7588: korkunç, gürültülü, gösterişli, telaşlı, çalkantılı Şah'tan; kargaşa (acele etme gibi); ima yoluyla, yıkım - X korkunç, gürültü, gösteriş, telaş, kargaşa (X -uous).
H7589: kibirli Bir kenara itmek anlamına gelen kullanılmayan bir kökten; saygısızlık -- rağmen(-ful).
H7590: küçümsenen şey Suwt'un aktif kısmı için (ş'at'ı karşılaştırın); bir küçümseyen - o (ki) küçümseyen (-d).
H7592: öğüt sormak, istemek, yalvarmak, ödünç almak, suçlamak, danışmak, talep etmek, arzulamak, Veya shael {shaw-ale'}; ilkel bir kök; sormak için; dolaylı olarak talep etmek; buna ek olarak, talep etmek - istemek (nasihat etmek, açık), yalvarmak, ödünç almak, suçlamak, danışmak, talep etmek, arzulamak, ciddiyetle, sormak, + selamlamak, izin almak, ödünç vermek, dua etmek, talep etmek, talep etmek, + selamlamak, kesinlikle, kesinlikle, dilemek.
H7593: sor, talep et, talep et (Aramice) sha'al'a karşılık gelir - sor, talep et, talep et.
H7594: Sheal Sha'al'dan; rica etmek; Sheal, bir İsrailli -- Sheal.
H7595: sh'el'den talep (Aramice); düzgün bir şekilde, bir soru (yasal olarak), yani yargı kararı veya talimatı - talep.
H7596: borç, dilekçe, rica Veya şelah (1 Samuel 1:17) {şay-yasası'}; sha'al'dan; bir dilekçe; dolaylı olarak, bir kredi - kredi, dilekçe, talep.
H7597: Shalthiel, Shealtiel Veya Shaltiy(el {shal-tee-ale'}; sha'al ve 'el'den; Tanrı'ya sordum; Shealtiel, bir İsrailli - Shalthiel, Shealtiel.
H7599: rahat ol, sus, dinlen İlkel bir kök; gevşemek, yani Huzurlu ol - rahat ol, sessiz ol, dinlen. Ayrıca bkz. Beyth Sh'an. Shaan
H7600: güvenli, rahat, sessiz Şa'an'dan; güvenli; kötü anlamda kibirli; bu rahat, sessiz, kargaşa demektir. Shalanan'ı karşılaştırın.
H7601: ilkel bir kökü bozmak; yağmalamak - yağmalamak.
H7602: ciddiyetle arzulamak, yutmak, acele etmek, solumak, yutmak, yutmak İlkel bir kökü; hevesle nefes almak; mecazi olarak kapsamak için; dolaylı olarak kızgın olmak; ayrıca acele etmek - (ciddi olarak) arzulamak, yutmak, acele etmek, nefes almak, enfiye etmek, yutmak.
H7603: maya Şa'ar'dan; barm veya maya keki (fermantasyonla şişme gibi) - maya.
H7604: bırak, bırak, bırak, kal, kalan, rezerve et, gerisi İlkel bir kök; uygun şekilde, şişmek, yani (nedensel olarak, yapmak) gereksiz olmak - bırakın, (olun) bırakın, bırakın, kalsın, kalan, rezerve edin, geri kalanı.
H7605: diğer, arta kalan, arta kalan, arta kalan, artakalan Şa'ar'dan; a kalan -- X diğer, kalan, kalan, kalan.
H7606: daha fazlası, kalıntı, dinlenme (Aramice) sh'ar'a karşılık gelir -- X, daha fazlası, kalıntı, dinlenme.
H7607: vücut, et, yiyecek, yakın akraba yakın akraba Şa'ar'dan; et (şişmiş olarak), canlı veya yiyecek olarak; genellikle her türlü yiyecek; mecazi olarak, kanla akraba - vücut, et, yiyecek, (yakın) akraba (-erkek, -kadın), yakın (yakın) (akraba).
H7608: yakın akraba kadınları Sh'er'in dişisi; kan bağı olan kadın - akraba kadınlarına yakın.
H7609: Sherah Sha'arah ile aynı; Sheerah, bir İsrailli -- Sherah.
H7610: Shear-jashub Ş'ar ve şuvb'dan; bir kalıntı geri dönecek; Şear-Yaşub, Isaiah'ın oğullarından biri olan Şear-yaşub'un sembolik adı.
H7611: kalan veya arta kalan Sha'ar'dan; bir geri kalan veya artık (hayatta kalan, son) kısım - kaçmış, bırakılmış, gelecek nesil, kalan(-der), kalıntı, kalıntı, dinlenme.
H7613: kabul edilmek, izzet, yücelik, kendini yükseltmek, nasa'dan yükselmek; bir yükseklik veya cüzzamlı kabuk; mecazi olarak sevinç veya neşe; rütbe veya karakterde yücelik - kabul edilmek, haysiyet, mükemmellik, yücelik, kendini yükseltmek, yükselmek.
H7614: Sheba, Sabeans Of foreign origin; Sheba, the name of three early progenitors of tribes and of an Ethiopian district -- Sheba, Sabeans.
H7615: Sabean Patronymic from Shba'; a Shebaite or descendant of Sheba -- Sabean.
H7616: broken in pieces From an unused root meaning to break up; a fragment, i.e. Ruin -- broken in pieces.
H7617: bring away, carry, carry away, lead, lead away, take captives, take away A primitive root; to transport into captivity -- (bring away, carry, carry away, lead, lead away, take) captive(-s), drive (take) away.
H7618: agate From an unused root (probably identical with that of shabah through the idea of subdivision into flashes or streamers (compare shabiyb) meaning to flame; a gem (from its sparkle), probably the agate -- agate.
H7619: Shebuel, Shubael Or Shuwbanel {shoo-baw-ale'}; from shabah (abbrev.) Or shuwb and 'el; captive (or returned) of God; Shebuel or Shubael, the name of two Israelites -- Shebuel, Shubael.
H7620: seven, week Or shabuan {shaw-boo'-ah}; also (feminine) shbu.ah {sheb-oo-aw'}; properly, passive participle of shaba' as a denominative of sheba'; literal, sevened, i.e. A week (specifically, of years) -- seven, week.
H7621: curse, oath, sworn Feminine passive participle of shaba'; properly, something sworn, i.e. An oath -- curse, oath, sworn.
H7622: captivity Or shbiyth {sheb-eeth'}; from shabah; exile, concretely, prisoners; figuratively, a former state of prosperity -- captive(-ity).
H7623: commend, glory, keep in, praise, still, triumph A primitive root; properly, to address in a loud tone, i.e. (specifically) loud; figuratively, to pacify (as if by words) -- commend, glory, keep in, praise, still, triumph.
H7624: praise (Aramaic) corresponding to shabach; to adulate, i.e. Adore -- praise.
H7625: tribe (Aramaic) corresponding to shebet; a clan -- tribe.
H7626: correction, dart, rod, scepter, staff, tribe From an unused root probably meaning to branch off; a scion, i.e. (literally) a stick (for punishing, writing, fighting, ruling, walking, etc.) Or (figuratively) a clan -- X correction, dart, rod, sceptre, staff, tribe.
H7627: Sebat Of foreign origin; Shebat, a Jewish month -- Sebat.
H7628: captivity, prisoners, take away, that was taken From shbuw; exiled; captured; as noun, exile (abstractly or concretely and collectively); by extension, booty -- captive(-ity), prisoners, take away, that was taken.
H7629: Shobi From shabah; captor; Shobi, an Ammonite -- Shobi.
H7630: Shobai For Shobiy; Shobai, an Israelite -- Shobai.
H7632: spark From the same as shabab; flame (as split into tongues) -- spark.
H7633: captives Feminine of shbiy; exile (abstractly or concretely and collectively) -- captives(-ity).
H7634: Shachia Feminine of the same as Shobiy; captivation; Shobjah, an Israelite -- Shachia (from the margin).
H7635: path From the same as shebel; a track or passage-way (as if flowing along) -- path.
H7636: caul From an unused root meaning to interweave; a netting for the hair -- caul.
H7637: seventh time Or shbi iy {sheb-ee-ee'}; ordinal from shib'iym.; seventh -- seventh (time).
H7638: net From an unused root meaning to intwine; a netting (ornament to the capital of a column) -- net.
H7639: checker, lattice, network, snare, wreathen work Feminine of sabak; a net-work, i.e (in hunting) a snare, (in architecture) a ballustrade; also a reticulated ornament to a pillar -- checker, lattice, network, snare, wreath(-enwork).
H7640: leg From an unused root meaning to flow; a lady's train (as trailing after her) -- leg.
H7641: branch, channel, ear of corn, water, flood, Shibboleth Or (feminine) shibboleth {shib-bo'-leth}; from the same as shebel; a stream (as flowing); also an ear of grain (as growing out); by analogy, a branch -- branch, channel, ear (of corn), ((water-))flood, Shibboleth. Compare cibboleth.
H7642: snail From the same as shebel; a snail (as if floating in its own slime) -- snail.
H7643: Shebam, Shibmah, Sibmah Or (feminine) Sibmah {sib-maw'}; probably from basam; spice; Sebam or Sibmah, a place in Moab -- Shebam, Shibmah, Sibmah.
H7644: Shebna, Shebnah : or Shebnah {sheb-naw'}; from an unused root meaning to grow; growth; Shebna or Shebnah, an Israelite -- Shebna, Shebnah.
H7645: Shebaniah Or Shbanyahuw {sheb-an-yaw'-hoo}; from the same as Shebna' and Yahh; Jah has grown (i.e. Prospered); Shebanjah, the name of three or four Israelites -- Shebaniah.
H7646: have enough, fill full, self, with, be to the full of, have plenty of, be satiatedOr sabeay {saw-bay'-ah}; a primitive root; to sate, i.e. Fill to satisfaction (literally or figuratively) -- have enough, fill (full, self, with), be (to the) full (of), have plenty of, be satiate, satisfy (with), suffice, be weary of.
H7647: abundance, plenteous, From saba'; copiousness -- abundance, plenteous(- ness, -ly).
H7648: fill, fullness, satisfying, be satisfied From saba'; satisfaction (of food or (figuratively) joy) -- fill, full(-ness), satisfying, be satisfied.
H7649: full of, satisfied with From saba'; satiated (in a pleasant or disagreeable sense) -- full (of), satisfied (with).
H7650: adjure, charge by an oath, with an oath, feed to the full A primitive root; propr. To be complete, but used only as a denominative from sheba'; to seven oneself, i.e. Swear (as if by repeating a declaration seven times) -- adjure, charge (by an oath, with an oath), feed to the full (by mistake for saba'), take an oath, straitly, (cause to, make to) swear.
H7651: by sevenfold, teen Or (masculine) shibrah {shib-aw'}; from shaba'; a primitive cardinal number; seven (as the sacred full one); also (adverbially) seven times; by implication, a week; by extension, an indefinite number -- (+ by) seven(-fold),-s, (-teen, -teenth), -th, times). Compare shib'anah.
H7652: Sheba The same as sheba'; seven; Sheba, the name of a place in Palestine, and of two Israelites -- Sheba.
H7653: fullness Feminine of saba'; satiety -- fulness.
H7654: to have enough, till Feminine of soba'; satiety -- (to have) enough, till...be full, (un-)satiable, satisfy, sufficiently.
H7655: seven times (Aramaic) corresponding to sheba' -- seven (times).
H7656: Shebah Masculine of sheba'; seven(-th); Shebah, a well in Palestine -- Shebah.
H7657: seventy, threescore and ten Multiple of sheba'; seventy -- seventy, threescore and ten (+ -teen).
H7658: seven Prol. For the masculine of sheba'; seven -- seven.
H7659: sevenfold, times Dual (adverbially) of sheba'; seven- times -- seven(-fold, times).
H7660: embroider, set A primitive root; to interweave (colored) threads in squares; by implication (of reticulation) to inchase gems in gold -- embroider, set.
H7661: anguish From shabats; entanglement, i.e. (figuratively) perplexity -- anguish.
H7662: leave, let alone (Aramaic) corresponding to the root of Showbeq; to quit, i.e. Allow to remain -- leave, let alone.
H7663: hope, tarry, view, wait Erroneously shabar (Nehemiah 2:13, Nehemiah 2:15) {shaw-bar'}; a primitive root; to scrutinize; by implication (of watching) to expect (with hope and patience) -- hope, tarry, view, wait.
H7665: break down, off, in pieces, up, brokenhearted, bring to the birth, crush, destroy, A primitive root; to burst (literally or figuratively) -- break (down, off, in pieces, up), broken((-hearted)), bring to the birth, crush, destroy, hurt, quench, quite, tear, view (by mistake for sabar).
H7666: buy, sell Denominative from sheber; to deal in grain -- buy, sell.
H7667: affliction, breach, breaking, broken-footed, bruise, crashing, destructionOr sheber {shay'-ber}; from shabar; a fracture, figuratively, ruin; specifically, a solution (of a dream) -- affliction, breach, breaking, broken(-footed, -handed), bruise, crashing, destruction, hurt, interpretation, vexation.
H7668: corn, victuals The same as sheber; grain (as if broken into kernels) -- corn, victuals.
H7669: Sheber The same as sheber; Sheber, an Israelite -- Sheber.
H7670: breaking, destruction From shabar; rupture, i.e. A pang; figuratively, ruin -- breaking, destruction.
H7671: Shebarim Plural of sheber; ruins; Shebarim, a place in Palestine -- Shebarim.
H7672: be astonished (Aramaic) corresponding to shabats; to entangle, i.e. Perplex -- be astonished.
H7673: cause to, let, make to cease, celebrate, cause make to failA primitive root; to repose, i.e. Desist from exertion; used in many implied relations (causative, figurative or specific) -- (cause to, let, make to) cease, celebrate, cause (make) to fail, keep (sabbath), suffer to be lacking, leave, put away (down), (make to) rest, rid, still, take away.
H7674: cease, sit still, loss of time From shabath; rest, interruption, cessation -- cease, sit still, loss of time.
H7675: place, seat Infinitive of yashab; properly, session; but used also concretely, an abode or locality -- place, seat. Compare Yosheb bash-Shebeth. bash-Shebeth
H7676: every Sabbath Intensive from shabath; intermission, i.e (specifically) the Sabbath -- (+ every) sabbath.
H7677: rest, sabbath From shabbath; a sabbatism or special holiday -- rest, sabbath.
H7678: Shabbethai From shabbath; restful; Shabbethai, the name of three Israelites -- Shabbethai.
H7679: increase, magnify : a primitive root; to grow, i.e. (causatively) to enlarge, (figuratively) laud -- increase, magnify.
H7680: grow, be multiplied (Aramaic) corresponding to saga'; to increase -- grow, be multiplied.
H7681: Shage Probably from shagah; erring; Shage, an Israelite -- Shage.
H7682: defend, exalt, be excellent, be, set on high, lofty, be safe, set up on high, A primitive root; to be (causatively, make) lofty, especially inaccessible; by implication, safe, strong; used literally and figuratively --defend, exalt, be excellent, (be, set on) high, lofty, be safe, set up (on high), be too strong.
H7683: deceived, err, go astray, sin ignorantly A primitive root; to stray, i.e. (figuratively) sin (with more or less apology) -- X also for that, deceived, err, go astray, sin ignorantly.
H7684: error, ignorance, at unawares, unwittingly From shagag; a mistake or inadvertent transgression -- error, ignorance, at unawares; unwittingly.
H7685: grow up, increase A primitive root; to enlarge (especially upward, also figuratively) -- grow (up), increase.
H7686: cause to go astray, deceive, err, be ravished, sin through ignorance, make to wander A primitive root; to stray (causatively, mislead), usually (figuratively) to mistake, especially (morally) to transgress; by extension (through the idea of intoxication) to reel, (figuratively) be enraptured -- (cause to) go astray, deceive, err, be ravished, sin through ignorance, (let, make to) wander.
H7687: Segub From sagab; aloft; Segub, the name of two Israelites -- Segub.
H7688: look narrowly A primitive root; to peep, i.e. Glance sharply at -- look (narrowly).
H7689: excellent, great From saga'; (superlatively) mighty -- excellent, great.
H7690: exceeding, greatly; many, much, sore, very (Aramaic) corresponding to saggiy'; large (in size, quantity or number, also adverbial) -- exceeding, great(-ly); many, much, sore, very.
H7691: error From shagah; a moral mistake -- error.
H7692: Shiggaion, Shigionoth Or shiggayonah {shig-gaw-yo-naw'}; from shagah; properly, aberration, i.e. (technically) a dithyramb or rambling poem -- Shiggaion, Shigionoth.
H7693: lie with, ravish A primitive root; to copulate with -- lie with, ravish.
H7694: queen From shagal; a queen (from cohabitation) -- queen.
H7695: wife (Aramaic) corresponding to shegal; a (legitimate) queen -- wife.
H7696: play the mad man A primitive root; to rave through insanity -- (be, play the) mad (man).
H7697: furiously, madness From shaga'; craziness -- furiously, madness.
H7698: ejectFrom an unused root probably meaning to eject; the fetus (as finally expelled) -- that cometh of, increase.
H7699: breast, pap, teat Or shod {shode}; probably from shuwd (in its original sense) contracted; the breast of a woman or animal (as bulging) -- breast, pap, teat.
H7700: devil From shuwd; a doemon (as malignant) -- devil.
H7701: desolation, destruction, oppression, robbery, spoiled wasting Or showd (Job 5:21) {shode}; from shuwd; violence, ravage -- desolation, destruction, oppression, robbery, spoil(-ed, -er, - ing), wasting.
H7702: break clods, harrow A primitive root; to abrade, i.e. Harrow a field -- break clods, harrow.
H7703: dead, destroyer, oppress, robber, spoiler, utterly, lay waste A primitive root; properly, to be burly, i.e. (figuratively) powerful (passively, impregnable); by implication, to ravage -- dead, destroy(-er), oppress, robber, spoil(-er), utterly, (lay) waste.
H7704: country, field, ground, land, soil, wild Or saday {saw-dah'-ee}; from an unused root meaning to spread out; a field (as flat) -- country, field, ground, land, soil, wild.
H7705: wife, mistress, musical instrument From shadad; a wife (as mistress of the house) -- X all sorts, musical instrument.
H7706: Almighty From shadad; the Almighty -- Almighty.
H7707: Shedeur From the same as sadeh and 'uwr; spreader of light; Shedejur, an Israelite -- Shedeur.
H7708: Siddim Plural from the same as sadeh; flats; Siddim, a valley in Palestine -- Siddim.
H7709: blasted, field Apparently from sadeh; a cultivated field; -- blasted, field.
H7710: blast A primitive root; to scorch -- blast.
H7711: blasted Or shiddaphown {shid-daw-fone'}; from shadaph; blight -- blasted(-ing).
H7712: labor (Aramaic) a primitive root; to endeavor -- labour.
H7713: board, range From an unused root meaning to regulate; a row, i.e. Rank (of soldiers), story (of rooms) -- board, range.
H7714: Shadrach Probably of foreign origin; Shadrak, the Bab. Name of one of Daniel's companions -- Shadrach.
H7715: Shadrach (Aramaic) the same as Shadrak -- Shadrach.
H7716: lesser, small cattle, ewe, goat, lamb, sheep Or sey {say}; probably from sha'ah through the idea of pushing out to graze; a member of a flock, i.e. A sheep or goat -- (lesser, small) cattle, ewe, goat, lamb, sheep. Compare zeh.
H7717: record From an unused root meaning to testify; a witness -- record.
H7718: onyx From an unused root probably mean to blanch; a gem, probably the beryl (from its pale green color) -- onyx.
H7719: Shoham The same as shoham; Shoham, an Israelite -- Shoham.
H7720: süs, ay gibi yuvarlak lastik Cahar'ın aynısından; boyun için yuvarlak bir kolye; süs, ay gibi yuvarlak bir lastik.
H7721: yükselmek anlamına gelen, kullanılmayan bir kökten (nasa' ve show'a benzer) doğmak; bir yükseliş - ortaya çıkma.
H7722: ıssızlık, yıkım, yıkım, fırtına, israf Veya (dişil) showtah {şo-aw'}; veya shoah {şo-aw'}; acele etmek anlamına gelen kullanılmayan bir kökten; bir fırtına; ima yoluyla, yıkım - ıssız (-iyon), yok etme, yıkım, fırtına, israf.
H7723: yalan, yalan, yalancılık, kibir, gösteriş Veya tıraş {shav}; ıssızlaştırma anlamında gösteriyle aynı olandan; kötülük (yıkıcı olarak), kelimenin tam anlamıyla (yıkıcı) veya ahlaki olarak (özellikle kurnazca); mecazi olarak putperestlik (yanlış, öznel olarak), işe yaramazlık (aldatıcı, nesnel olarak; ayrıca zarf olarak, boşuna) - yanlış(-ly), yalan, yalan, boş, gösteriş.
H7724: Şeva Şav'ın aynısından; YANLIŞ; Sheva, bir İsrailli -- Sheva.
H7725: kırmak, inşa etmek, sünnet etmek, kazmak, her şeyi yapmak, kötülük yapmak, beslemek, yatırmak, İlkel bir kök; geçişli veya geçişsiz, kelimenin tam anlamıyla veya mecazi olarak geri dönmek (dolayısıyla uzaklaşmak) (mutlaka başlangıç ​​noktasına dönüş fikriyle birlikte olması gerekmez); genellikle geri çekilmek; sıklıkla zarf, tekrar -- ((kırmak, inşa etmek, sünnet etmek, kazmak, herhangi bir şey yapmak, kötülük yapmak, beslemek, uzanmak, uzanmak, yerleştirmek, yapmak, sevinmek, göndermek, almak, ağlamak)) X tekrar, (neden olmak) cevaplamak (+ tekrar), her durumda (akıllıca), hiç, kaçınmak, getirmek (tekrar, geri, eve tekrar), aramak (akla), tekrar taşımak (geri), durdurmak, kesinlikle, tekrar gelmek (geri), düşünmek, + sürekli, dönüştürmek, teslim etmek (tekrar), + inkar etmek, geri çekmek, eve geri getirmek, geri dönmek, (kendini) geri almak (tekrar), vermek (tekrar), tekrar gitmek (geri, eve), (gitmek) dışarı, engellemek, izin vermek, (görmek) daha fazla, ihtiyaçlar, geçmiş olmak, ödemek, sapıklık, tekrar içeri çekmek, koymak (tekrar, tekrar), geri çağırmak, telafi etmek, iyileşmek, yenilemek, rahatlatmak, vermek (tekrar), karşılık vermek, kurtarmak, onarmak, geri almak, (neden olmak, yapmak) geri dönmek, tersine çevirmek, ödüllendirmek, + söylemek hayır, geri gönder, tekrar ayarla, geri kaydır, yine de, kesinlikle, geri al (kapat), (neden olmak, yapmak) dönmek (tekrar, kendini tekrar, uzağa, geri, tekrar geri, geri, geri, kapalı), geri çekil.
H7726: geriye doğru kaymak, şuvb'dan uzaklaşmak; mürted, yani putperest - geriye doğru kayan, ön plana çıkan, (kenar kenarından) yüz çeviren.
H7727: Şobab Gösteri babının aynısı; asi; Şobab, iki İsraillinin adı: Şobab.
H7728: Şuwb'dan geriye doğru kaymak; mürted, yani Kafir veya (aslında) kafir - geri dönen.
H7729: Shuwb'dan dönen; bir dönüş - geri dönüş.
H7730: kalın dallar Çoban için; çalılık, yani iç içe geçmiş dallar - kalın dallar.
H7731: Shobach Belki sowbek için; Shobak, Suriyeli -- Shobach.
H7732: Şobal Şebel'in aynısından; taşan; Şobal, bir Edomlu ile iki İsraillinin adı: Şobal.
H7733: Shobek Ayrılmak anlamına gelen ilkel bir kökten gelen aktif katılımcı (shbaq'ı karşılaştırın); vazgeçmek; Shobek, bir İsrailli -- Shobek.
H7734: geri dönüş İlkel bir kök; geri çekilmek - geri dönmek.
